description: The TubeWireMesh component acts as a source of procedural Mesh data. This creates a mesh like the StripeWireMesh but is a tube instead.

fields.Point0: The starting point for the tube mesh.
fields.Point1: The ending point for the tube mesh.
fields.Tangent0: The bend towards point at the beginning.
fields.Tangent1: The bend towards point at the end.
fields.Orientation0: The rotation of the end cap at the beginning of the tube.
fields.Orientation1: The rotation of the end cap at the end of the tube.
fields.Steps: How many length wise subdivisions there is.
fields.Exp: How much to stretch mesh geometry towards the tangent points.
fields.Color0: The color of the vertex colors at the starting point.
fields.Color1: The color of the vertex colors at the ending point.
fields.UVScale: The scale of the texture detail on this mesh's surface.
fields.UVOffset: The offset of the texture detail on this mesh's surface.
fields.Radius0: The starting radius of the tube.
fields.Radius1: The ending radius of the tube.
fields.Ends: How to seal the ends of the mesh, if at all.
fields.Points: How many subdivisions circumference wise the tube has.

usage: Attach to a slot, then insert into a MeshRenderer with a material to view what this mesh looks like.
